typescript.title: Array Splice
typescript.explanation: How do you remove one element and add 'drill' at index 1 in const tools: string[] = ['hammer', 'screwdriver', 'wrench']?

typescript.title: Array Slice
typescript.explanation: How do you extract the first two elements without mutating const items: string[] = ['a', 'b', 'c']?

typescript.title: Typed Regex
typescript.explanation: How do you extract 'user' and 'host' from const email = 'hello@example.com' using named groups?
typescript.code:
const pattern: RegExp = /(?<user>.*)@(?<host>.*)/;
const match = email.match(pattern);

typescript.title: Object Iteration
typescript.explanation: How do you log every key and value in const data: Record<string, number> = { a: 1, b: 2 } using entries?

typescript.title: For Of Loop
typescript.explanation: How do you iterate through the values of const list: string[] = ['x', 'y', 'z'] directly?

typescript.title: For In Loop
typescript.explanation: How do you access values by key in const obj = { a: 1 } using a property loop and type assertion?

typescript.title: Optional Chaining
typescript.explanation: How do you safely access a nested property like 'zip' from an object that might be null or undefined without throwing an error?

typescript.title: Nullish Coalescing
typescript.explanation: How do you provide a default value of 0 to a variable only when the input is null or undefined (but not 0 or false)?

typescript.title: Type Narrowing (typeof)
typescript.explanation: How do you ensure a variable of type 'string | number' is treated as a string so you can safely call .toLowerCase()?

go.title: Executable Structure
go.explanation: How do you define a minimal, executable Go program that prints a message to standard output?

go.title: Variable Initialization
go.explanation: How do you declare a strongly-typed integer and an implicitly-typed string?

go.title: Multiple Returns And Errors
go.explanation: How do you define a function that handles an edge case by returning a result alongside an explicit error?

node.title: Basic HTTP Server
node.explanation: How do you create a simple HTTP server in Node.js that listens on a specific port and responds with a message?

node.title: Read File Asynchronously
node.explanation: How do you read the contents of a file asynchronously using the built-in fs module without blocking the event loop?

node.title: Exporting and Importing Modules
node.explanation: How do you define a function in one file and export it using CommonJS so it can be required and used in another file?

node.title: Write File Asynchronously
node.explanation: How do you write data to a file asynchronously using the built-in fs module, creating or overwriting the file without blocking the event loop?

node.title: Working with File Paths
node.explanation: How do you safely join and manipulate directory paths in a cross-platform way (Windows vs macOS/Linux) using the built-in path module?

node.title: Custom Event Emitters
node.explanation: How do you create, emit, and listen to your own custom events using Node's core event-driven architecture?
